candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to the explicit total current assets line.
Wrong section; non-current rather than current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet match for cash and cash equivalents.
Close cash measure but narrower/less preferred than the explicit cash and cash equivalents total.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents, closing balance
candidates.why: Cash flow closing balance mirrors period-end cash, but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash total, preferred over components or cash-flow balances.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Trade payables and other current liabilities
candidates.why: Major current-liability subtotal/component, but not the full total current liabilities.
Component only, not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit current liabilities total.

candidates.why: Best clean total for short-term/current borrowings and current maturities; excludes need to add lease rows.

candidates.row_label: Utilized bank overdraft and short-term credit facilities at amortized cost
candidates.why: Could be a component of current borrowings, not needed if current borrowings total exists.
Represents current maturities of long-term debt, but appears supplemental and may overlap with current borrowings.

variables.notes: Chose the clean current debt total. Excluded lease rows per rule and avoided supplemental/current-maturity rows to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Trade payables, current tax liabilities, short-term provisions and other current liabilities - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not a clean tax payable amount.

variables.notes: Explicit current taxes payable line identified.

candidates.why: Exact reported PPE line; preferred total/net PPE measure.
Not the main PPE total; likely balancing/minor item.
Would be gross PPE if populated, but no values shown and the net total exists explicitly.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit total PPE line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Non-current asset component, not total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact match for operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities.

variables.notes: Direct operating cash flow line on the cash flow statement.
